decisions.summary: Bundle the four Journey/Visual QA pipeline stories in this PR because src/cli.js, src/pr-manager.js, flow verification, journey mapping, visual residual verification, and shared acceptance tests form one cross-story gate/evidence contract; splitting would duplicate reviews and risk inconsistent VibePro readiness behavior.
decisions.reason: The branch is already a clean worktree rebased on origin/main, with current-head [REDACTED:ef3e51298f09] evidence recorded for all four stories. The only added side-session migration is the artifact-backed Visual QA fallback fix, which directly protects the shared gate contract.

decisions.summary: Scope reviewed: this implementation PR intentionally bundles the four producer-side journey/UI-UX pipeline stories because their contracts share the same VibePro gate path; review ownership is split by story and stage in Agent Review.
decisions.reason: The changed files are cohesive around journey curation, flow screenshot visual evidence, local residual verification, and dogfood route evidence. Separate follow-up only remains for real-project dogfood execution.
